sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ السُّكُوتَ أَحْيَانًا أَفْضَلُ مِنَ الْكَلَامِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da je šutnja ponekad bolja od govora.
sentences.translationEn: This means that staying silent is sometimes better than speaking.

sentences.arabic: سَمِعَ حَسَنٌ كَلَامًا غَيْرَ صَحِيحٍ عَنْ صَدِيقِهِ.
sentences.translation: Hasan je čuo netačne stvari o svom prijatelju.
sentences.translationEn: Hassan heard untrue things about his friend.

sentences.arabic: فَضَّلَ الصَّمْتَ وَلَمْ يَنْشُرِ الْكَلَامَ السَّيِّئَ.
sentences.translation: Odlučio je šutjeti i nije širio loše priče.
sentences.translationEn: He chose to stay silent and did not spread the bad talk.
